title: Electro's PowerCraft - OMV/Older Minecraft Version Edition
body:
Electro's PowerCraft OMV Edition is more similar to Electro's PowerCraft but meant for older Minecraft Versions. Electro's PowerCraft is a great Mod for Realistic Survival Gameplay! Enjoy Various Powers to fight off powerful entities, Play New Music and Trades with new Professions!

- ⚠️ NOTE: As you may use the new Minecraft Versions of Electro's PowerCraft with 1.19+, Not all Features will be supported on older Minecraft Versions.

- New Monsters
- Fascinating Powers to Craft
- Elemental Weapons and Tools
- Additional Medical Supplies
- New Foods
- New Professions
- Music Disks
- And More
